title: Brent Jumps 7% to $114 as Spread With WTI Widens to 11-Year High
summary: The Brent-WTI spread widened sharply in early trading Thursday, pushing toward an 11-year high as Middle East supply disruptions drove a deepening split between global and U.S. crude markets. Brent crude surged nearly 7% to above $114 per barrel while U.S. West Texas Intermediate edged up just 0.2%…

summary: Gold and silver prices moved lower on Thursday.

title: $200 Oil No Longer Crazy Idea as Middle East Supply Collapses
summary: A month ago, any analyst suggesting international oil prices could soar all the way to $200 per barrel would have been laughed out of the studio.
